vaultResetDescription: This will permanently delete all vault data for {name}. This action cannot be undone.
vaultResetRateLimited: Too many reset requests. Please try again later.
revokeConflict: This reset has already been processed or revoked.
maxConcurrentSessionsHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous sessions per user. When a user exceeds this limit, the oldest session is automatically terminated. Range: {min}–{max}.
concurrentSessionsUnlimited: No limit on concurrent sessions per user
idleTimeoutHelp: Sign out users after this many minutes of inactivity. Range: {min}–{max} minutes. WebAuthn (passkey) sessions use stricter AAL3 limits (15 min idle / 12 h absolute) regardless of this value.
absoluteTimeoutHelp: Absolute session lifetime from sign-in, regardless of activity. Range: {min}–{max} minutes.
extensionIdleHelp: Extension access token is revoked after this many minutes without use. Range: {min}–{max} minutes. Values near the minimum may be unreliable due to Chrome extension service-worker dormancy.
extensionAbsoluteHelp: Extension token family is revoked after this many minutes from first issue. Range: {min}–{max} minutes.
vaultAutoLockEnabled: Automatically lock the vault after inactivity
vaultAutoLockHelp: Automatically lock the vault after this many minutes of inactivity; re-entry of the master passphrase is required to unlock. Must be between {min} and {max} minutes AND not longer than the web session idle timeout or the browser-extension idle timeout above (locking the vault later than the session/token expires leaves cached data decrypted past sign-out).
vaultAutoLockExceedsIdleCap: Vault auto-lock must be {n} minutes or less (same as the shorter of the web session / extension idle timeouts above).
accessRestrictionDescription: Restrict access to this tenant by IP address or Tailscale network. When configured, only matching connections are allowed (OR logic).
allowedCidrsHelp: Enter one CIDR per line (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24). Maximum {max} entries. Leave empty to allow all IPs.
tailscaleEnabled: Restrict access to the Tailscale network
tailscaleEnabledHelp: When enabled, only connections from the specified Tailscale tailnet are allowed.
tailscaleTailnetHelp: The tailnet name to allow (e.g. "example" for hostname.example.ts.net).
tailscaleTailnetRequired: Tailnet name is required when Tailscale restriction is enabled.
selfLockoutWarning: Your current IP would be blocked by this policy. Are you sure you want to proceed?
scimManagedRoleError: Cannot change role of SCIM-managed member.
transferOwnershipDesc: Transfer ownership to another member. Your role will be changed to Admin.
requirePasskeyHelp: When enabled, all users must enroll a passkey to sign in. A grace period allows existing users time to comply.
passkeyGracePeriodHelp: Number of days existing users have to enroll a passkey before access is restricted. Leave empty for no grace period.
requireMinPinLengthHelp: Minimum number of characters required for passkey PINs (4–63). Leave empty for no minimum.
passkeyGracePeriodValidationMin: Grace period must be at least 1 day.
passkeyGracePeriodValidationMax: Grace period must be 90 days or less.
passkeyMinPinLengthValidationMin: Minimum PIN length must be at least 4.
passkeyMinPinLengthValidationMax: Minimum PIN length must be 63 or less.
lockoutPolicyDescription: Configure tiered lockout thresholds and durations.
lockoutThresholdHelp: Number of consecutive failed login attempts that triggers this lockout tier (1–50). Leave empty to disable this tier.
lockoutDurationHelp: How long the account is locked after reaching the threshold (1–10080 minutes = 1 week). Leave empty to disable this tier.
lockoutDurationRange: Duration must be between 1 and 10080 minutes.
lockoutThresholdAscending: Thresholds must be in ascending order across tiers.
lockoutDurationAscending: Durations must be in ascending order across tiers.
passwordPolicyDescription: Configure password strength and expiry requirements.
tenantMinPasswordLengthHelp: Minimum number of characters required for user passwords (0–128). Set to 0 to disable.
passwordMaxAgeEnabledHelp: When enabled, users will be prompted to change their password after the specified number of days.
passwordMaxAgeDaysHelp: Number of days before a password expires (1–730). Users will be notified before expiry.
passwordMaxAgeRequired: Password max age is required when expiry is enabled.
passwordExpiryWarningDaysHelp: Number of days before expiry to start showing warnings (1–90). Leave empty for no warning.
passwordExpiryWarningValidationMin: Warning period must be at least 1 day.
passwordExpiryWarningValidationMax: Warning period must be 90 days or less.
auditLogRetentionEnabled: Limit the retention period for audit logs
auditLogRetentionEnabledHelp: When enabled, audit logs older than the specified number of days will be automatically purged.
auditLogRetentionDaysHelp: Number of days to retain audit logs (30–3650). Logs older than this will be deleted automatically.
auditLogRetentionRequired: Retention period is required when retention limit is enabled.
auditLogRetentionValidationMin: Retention period must be at least 30 days.
auditLogRetentionValidationMax: Retention period must be 3650 days or less.
tokenPolicyDescription: Configure expiry limits for service account (SA) tokens and Just-In-Time (JIT) access tokens.
saTokenMaxExpiryEnabledHelp: When enabled, service account tokens cannot be created with an expiry beyond the specified number of days.
saTokenMaxExpiryDaysHelp: Maximum allowed token lifetime in days (1–3650).
saTokenMaxExpiryRequired: Maximum expiry days is required when SA token expiry limit is enabled.
saTokenMaxExpiryValidationMin: Maximum expiry must be at least 1 day.
saTokenMaxExpiryValidationMax: Maximum expiry must be 3650 days or less.
jitTokenDefaultEnabledHelp: When enabled, JIT access tokens are issued with this default lifetime unless the requester specifies otherwise.
jitTokenDefaultTtlSecHelp: Default JIT token lifetime in seconds (60–86400).
jitTokenDefaultRequired: Default TTL is required when JIT token default is enabled.
jitTokenMaxEnabledHelp: When enabled, JIT access tokens cannot be issued with a lifetime exceeding this value.
jitTokenMaxTtlSecHelp: Maximum JIT token lifetime in seconds (60–86400).
jitTokenMaxRequired: Maximum TTL is required when JIT token max is enabled.
jitTokenTtlValidationMin: TTL must be at least 60 seconds.
jitTokenTtlValidationMax: TTL must be 86400 seconds or less.
jitTokenDefaultExceedsMax: Default TTL must not exceed the maximum TTL.
delegationPolicyDescription: Configure TTL limits for vault delegation sessions used by CLI agents.
delegationDefaultEnabledHelp: When enabled, delegation sessions are created with this default lifetime.
delegationDefaultTtlSecHelp: Default delegation session lifetime in seconds (60–86400).
delegationDefaultRequired: Default TTL is required when delegation default is enabled.
delegationMaxEnabledHelp: When enabled, delegation sessions cannot be created with a lifetime exceeding this value.
delegationMaxTtlSecHelp: Maximum delegation session lifetime in seconds (60–86400).
delegationMaxRequired: Maximum TTL is required when delegation max is enabled.
delegationTtlValidationMin: TTL must be at least 60 seconds.
delegationTtlValidationMax: TTL must be 86400 seconds or less.
delegationDefaultExceedsMax: Default TTL must not exceed the maximum TTL.
